# Abhishek Adhikari — Portfolio
> Agritech entrepreneur, SEO consultant, and community builder from Hetauda, Nepal

## Core pages
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/ — Home: portfolio overview, key metrics, skills, experience, projects, certifications, blog, recommendations, contact
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/about — About: background in agritech, community building, and digital growth
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/experience — Experience: 11 roles across agritech, tech communities, design, and consulting
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/work — Projects: 15 digital products built across agriculture, SEO, coffee, and business sectors
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/volunteering — Volunteering: 15 community leadership and mentorship activities
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/certifications — Certifications: 10 professional credentials
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/news — News & Media: 7 media mentions and public recognition
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/recommendations — Recommendations: 11 LinkedIn recommendations
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/blog — Blog: articles on design trends, agritech Nepal, React performance, content strategy, user research, no-code development
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/contact — Contact form and social links

## Key facts
- Founded Himalaya Krishi: scaled Murrah buffalo livestock from 25 to 220+ head
- Co-founded DEV Community Nepal: organized 100+ virtual events and 10+ physical meetups
- Built Hashtag Web Solutions: SEO consulting for 10+ clients, built 100+ SEO tools
- Deputy Community Builder at Coding Olympics Nepal: reached 16+ colleges
- Contributed 12 agentic skills to Antigravity Awesome Skills (41k+ GitHub stars, 1,541+ skills) — ranked global top 10 contributor in the world-famous open-source agentic skills repository
- Google UX Design Professional Certificate holder
- Google Digital Marketing certified
- Worked as Business Development Manager, Branch Manager, and Marketing Manager at Aayo Rides Nepal
- Product Designer at Sajilo Patro, UI/UX Designer at Kisan Care
- UI/UX mentor for 18 Days UI/UX Designing Program, Figma Crash Course, and Code for Change workshops
- Lead Organizer of AWS Cloud Innovation Day Hetauda 2026, HRIC STEAM Program 2025, Krishi Pradarshani 2083
- Panelist at Hult Prize IOF Hetauda
- Ranked global top 10 contributor in Antigravity Awesome Skills (41k+ stars) — a world-famous open-source library of 1,541+ agentic skills for AI coding tools
- Based in Hetauda, Bagmati Province, Nepal

## Certifications (all 10)
